gatesPassed: test unit — all spec-082 Go contract + config tests + shell test PASS; internal/deploy + internal/config packages green

certification.certificationNote: Low-risk hardening batch (config/compose/validator/docs/tests). Implement + test + mechanical gate suite + traceability executed inline in parent-expanded-child-mode (no specialist sub-agent dispatch available in this runtime). The five external dependencies R-082-A..E (on-GPU accel validation, knb L2 secret injection + secret population, knb backup/Alertmanager/Grafana standup, actual evo-x2 deploy, side-service tailnet binding) remain explicitly out-of-repo and are NOT claimed as done.

completedPhaseClaims.summary: All 9 scopes implemented: telegram blanking; ollama concurrent-envelope guard (config.go) + 28G home-lab floor + Operations.md reconcile; ml-model-cache persistent volume (DISC-082-01 refinement); nats durability label; searxng SST limits; postgres/nats/ollama digest pins; promote.sh dual-shape parsing; go-live checklist; ROCm GID fail-loud routing. config.go compiles; config generate EXIT 0.

3 new envelope tests + 5 new/extended deploy contract tests (all with adversarial sub-tests) + 1 shell test. All PASS via ./smackerel.sh test unit --go --go-run and bash runner; internal/config + internal/deploy packages green (verified uncached -count=1 by regression phase).

REGRESSION-CLEAN. No 082 change breaks an existing test/contract; cross-spec coherence with 042/045/049/051/052/017 verified; every behavioral change carries an adversarial test. The 2 full-suite reds (node/dart canary, Development.md doc-freshness) are pre-existing and not in the 082 diff.

CLEAN. Promote refactor + contract-test extensions follow repo convention with no harmful duplication. F5 (document OLLAMA_RENDER_GID/OLLAMA_VIDEO_GID in deploy/README.md) remediated this round; F1/F2/F3/F6 are optional cosmetic, no churn warranted.

All 62 DoD items across 9 scopes flipped [x] with executed evidence in report.md; every FR-082-001..009 satisfied; 2 in-flight design refinements (DISC-082-01 ml cache path, DISC-082-02 test location) recorded and resolved. No implementation gap.

check (build+vet+config-sync+scenario-lint) EXIT 0; lint EXIT 0; format EXIT 0. NO-DEFAULTS/fail-loud SST preserved throughout (searxng + GID routing use ${VAR:?...}); read-only-root + tailnet-bind invariants intact.

SECURE. No new vuln, no weakened gate, no secret/PII added; net hardening (digest pins, fail-loud GID routing, bundle-sha regex, PII removal, nats/ml durability). 4 LOW/INFO advisory follow-ups, none blocking.

docs/Operations.md model catalog reconciled + concurrent-envelope guard documented; docs/Deployment.md Go-Live Readiness Checklist added; deploy/README.md adapter-supplied host env table added; specs/_spec-review-report.md dated addendum (append-only). golive_checklist_docs_contract_test enforces the checklist anchors.

Claims-vs-reality: every report.md evidence block is executed terminal output (no fabrication); traceability-guard PASSED (10/10 scenarios map to rows + DoD, 10 concrete test refs, 10 report evidence refs, 0 warnings); scopes-path-ref drift ratchet 270/270. 5 external deps R-082-A..E documented as tracked, NOT faked.

Ship-readiness + policy: NO-DEFAULTS (G028), build-once-deploy-many (G074/G081 reinforced by digest pins), no-env-specific-content (GID routing strengthens the boundary), env-pollution/release-train policies honored. artifact-lint driven to pass. Anti-fabrication: pre-existing failures honestly attributed, external deps not claimed done.

Spec 082 freshly authored 2026-06-09, CURRENT: spec/design/scopes/scenario-manifest/report/uservalidation/state mutually consistent; design refinements DISC-082-01/02 recorded; artifact-lint + traceability-guard pass. No drift.

stabilize.reason: No live-stack performance/infra pass was run because this is a static contract/config/validator/docs hardening batch with NO new runtime code path to profile, and the CPU-only WSL2 dev host is not the production target. The changes are stability-POSITIVE by construction: the concurrent-envelope guard PREVENTS the home-lab ollama OOM crash-loop, the ml-model-cache removes a HuggingFace reboot-recovery dependency, and the nats durability label prevents clean from wiping queued captures. bubbles.regression confirmed no destabilization and no perf regression.
stabilize.justification: Real on-host performance characterization (rocminfo gfx target, ollama ps resident memory under concurrent load, accel-tier latency) requires the physical evo-x2 and is explicitly tracked as out-of-scope dependency R-082-A. Running a perf pass on the CPU-only dev host would produce misleading numbers.

chaos.reason: No runtime chaos pass was run because chaos testing requires a live multi-service stack (postgres+nats+core+ml+ollama) and these changes introduce NO new runtime request path, connector, or API surface to perturb — they are compose/config/validator/docs contracts verified statically by adversarial unit tests.
chaos.justification: A live evo-x2 stack is not reachable from the CPU-only dev host; the supervised-canary first apply (which exercises the real adapter→bundle→secret-injection→runtime path) is the appropriate chaos surface and is documented in the Go-Live Readiness Checklist, tracked as out-of-scope dependencies R-082-A/R-082-D.
